report.summary: Cycle 3 close Apr 3: 41 uncommitted files (up from 40 at cycle 2). 2 newly published slugs (impermanent-loss + hyperliquid) have NO page.tsx on disk — phantom entries. 111 total published slugs lack page.tsx files. TS errors confined to structured-data.examples.ts (non-blocking, ignoreBuildErrors: true). 6/6 API routes present with caching; 1/6 fallback, 0/6 rate-limited. Deploy debt at 14th consecutive escalation.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: REGRESSION: 2 pages published in latest commit (impermanent-loss-liquidity-providing-guide-2026, hyperliquid-perp-dex-trading-guide-2026) have NO page.tsx files on disk. These will 404 in production. Needs immediate fix before next deploy.

4 new learn guides from latest commit verified: crypto-staking-guide-2026, euler-v2-modular-lending-guide-2026, flash-loans-defi-guide-2026, hyperlane-permissionless-interoperability-guide-2026 — all present with correct metadata exports, no use-client conflicts.
2 untracked pages (Drift Protocol hack + Polkadot Staking Halving) are on disk but not yet committed. Both have metadata, still missing structured data.
TypeScript check: errors only in structured-data.examples.ts (reference/doc file). Build unaffected due to ignoreBuildErrors: true.
111 total published slugs have no matching page.tsx — persistent gap between published-pages.ts entries and actual pages on disk.
StablecoinYieldTracker component exists at src/components/StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx (modified, uncommitted). Tool page at src/app/tools/stablecoin-yield-tracker/ exists.
Cannot verify live HTTP status — sandbox egress blocked to degen0x.com. Last production commit: e3f63fc.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present on disk: prices (118 lines), fear-greed (47), trending (62), market-metrics (150), market-dominance (140), defi-yields (149).
Cache pattern coverage: prices 16 refs, market-dominance 15 refs, market-metrics 13 refs, trending 10 refs, fear-greed 10 refs, defi-yields 1 ref. All have in-memory caching with TTLs.

FALLBACK_DATA coverage unchanged: only prices (1 ref) and market-dominance (4 refs). fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields still have 0 fallback data — will return errors if both cache and upstream fail.
All 6 routes have try/catch error handling (1 catch block each for fear-greed, trending, defi-yields).
Rate limiting: still 0/6 public API routes use checkRateLimit(). Unchanged from cycle 2.
Cannot verify upstream API health (CoinGecko, DefiLlama) — sandbox blocked.

sections.title: DevOps
items: Production commit: e3f63fc (Apr 2) — 4 learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker.
Uncommitted files: 41 total (5 modified + 36 untracked) — up 1 from cycle 2. Growth includes new community drafts and social cards for Apr 3.
Modified files: package-lock.json, community report, portfolio-rebalancing page, StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx, published-pages.ts.
Key untracked: 2 learn pages (Drift + Polkadot), 2 OG SVGs, 6 social cards, 20+ report files, AUDIT_REPORT.md.
Build config: ignoreBuildErrors: true — TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts won't block deploy but indicate code quality debt.
Deploy debt: 14th consecutive escalation. All content since e3f63fc is invisible to Google and users.

WARNING: 2 phantom published entries (impermanent-loss + hyperliquid) must be removed from published-pages.ts OR pages must be created before next deploy, or production will serve 404s for these slugs.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Shipped since last EOD: 6 agents ran (build, community, 2 standups, 2 EODs). Social drafts v23 produced with 2 new social cards (Drift hack + Wormhole unlock).
Delta from cycle 2: +1 uncommitted file, 2 phantom published pages identified (new finding). No new page.tsx files created this cycle.
Carry-over (growing): 41 uncommitted files. 2 phantom published slugs (impermanent-loss + hyperliquid). 2 untracked pages need structured data. Berachain + DCA guides still in Degen0x workspace only.
Content totals: 308 learn page.tsx + 113 tool page.tsx = 421 on disk. 637 published slugs (310 learn + 89 tools + 238 other). Gap of 216 slugs without page.tsx.
BLOCKER for Jefe (P0): 1) Remove or create pages for impermanent-loss + hyperliquid phantom slugs. 2) Commit + deploy 41 uncommitted files. 14th consecutive escalation.
P1: Add structured data to Drift Protocol and Polkadot Staking pages before publish.
P2: Add FALLBACK_DATA to 4 API routes (fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields).
P3: Add checkRateLimit() to all 6 public API routes.
